question: Do not download artifacts, edit files, or run commands. From the update-golden-values skill, answer in at most 8 bullets: what exact scripts and flags are used for an only-failing GitHub refresh, what safety check is required before resetting existing goldens, how is the relative-diff CSV interpreted, and what PR-summary fields must be reported?
ground_truth: The response should use the update-golden-values skill and include: the download script tests/test_utils/python_scripts/download_golden_values.py and comparison script tests/test_utils/python_scripts/compare_golden_values_kl.py, noting the _kl suffix is legacy and the script reports avg_rel_diff. Source should be github, and only-failing scope uses --only-failing with --pipeline-id <WORKFLOW_RUN_ID>. The download script needs GITHUB_TOKEN, which may be derived from gh auth token but must not be exported into a long-lived shell or committed. Before any reset, inspect existing golden-value edits; if discarding them, use git checkout -- tests/functional_tests/test_cases/ and remove untracked files under that tree only after warning that untracked deletions cannot be recovered from git. The comparison CSV has file, metric, n_steps, avg_rel_diff where avg_rel_diff = mean((old - new) / old), signed positive meaning new is smaller than old and negative meaning new is larger. Sort/filter by absolute avg_rel_diff but preserve sign. PR summary should state whether it is only-failing or all, the workflow run ID, the download command with --only-failing when used, number of updated golden-value files, comparison coverage in files x metrics and total rows, per-metric headline numbers for lm loss, num-zeros, iteration-time, mem-allocated-bytes, mem-max-allocated-bytes, distribution buckets of |avg_rel_diff|, and any notes about run-to-run noise thresholds.
expected_behavior: Uses the update-golden-values skill guidance before answering.
Names download_golden_values.py and compare_golden_values_kl.py and explains the legacy _kl suffix.
Uses --source github, --pipeline-id, and --only-failing for failed-job-only refreshes.
Warns before resetting tracked or deleting untracked golden-value files and protects credentials.
Explains avg_rel_diff sign, absolute-value ranking, and the required PR summary sections.
